description.value: **Benefit:** You can enhance any spell that targets a single creature to become a tumultuous spell. A creature hit by a tumultuous spell (if the spell requires an attack roll ) or that fails its saving throw against a tumultuous spell immediately moves 1d4Ã5 feet in a random direction. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. If this movement would force a creature into a solid object or another creature, the movement ends harmlessly just before impact. A tumultuous spell uses a spell slot 1 level higher than the spellâs normal spell level. Spells with the lawful descriptor canât be tumultuous spells.
